rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build/tool stages may pass on skill-doc-only commits even when required source files are absent; only review stages catch the delta.","scope":"pipeline stages"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Same failure mode recurred: skill docs + pipeline state files committed, zero source files created.","scope":"pipeline stages"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Review stage validates actual source file presence in the commit diff, not just build/tool success.","scope":"review"}]}
